cases.title: Memorial from Central Carolina Presbytery re: Louisiana Presbytery and TE J. Steven Wilkins
cases.synopsis: Central Carolina Presbytery sent a memorial alleging that TE J. Steven Wilkins of Louisiana Presbytery was teaching doctrines (Federal Vision/Auburn Avenue theology) in flagrant contradiction to the Westminster Standards regarding election, covenant, and baptism. The SJC, after extended proceedings and directing Louisiana Presbytery to re-examine TE Wilkins, found Louisiana Presbytery had not adequately addressed the concerns and directed it via amends to appear under BCO 40-5 to account for its actions.
